raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a set of Landscape Edging Border ( 2 Inch tall, 100 ft with 150 pcs spikes ) for {$49.00} at XXXX on XX/XX/2025. order number is XXXX. It was delivered on XX/XX/2025. 

After I found the item doesn't fit my garden project, I decided to return the item. I processed return online and got return barcode on XX/XX/2025. 

I dropped the item at XXXX XXXX, IL store, # XXXX on XX/XX/2025. The Customer Service person scanned the return barcode on my phone. 

Until XX/XX/XXXX, I don't see the refund appears on my credit card account. I started chat online with XXXX  to ask why it yet refund. The chat was going very well and told me it will refund my shortly. 

But right after I am off the chat, I saw an email from XXXX that says Your account has been deactivated. 

I have emailed XXXX for the situation. The reply is : " Thank you for contacting XXXX XXXX XXXX. We take our customers ' concerns seriously and are glad to hear from you. 
As described, this is not something that our office would handle. You may contact our Customer Service team by calling XXXX. '' I called XXXX, they didn't take the case.
